n: Rending the Shadows of Sâd Meryrn

steps.t: Sâd Meryrn can be found due south of Nífdir's camp, but you should strike north and west to reach the glade. Nífdir has asked you to plant the mallorn…
Nenedhel awaits news of Nífdir's endeavour at Estolad Mernael, east of Nífdir's encampment. You should speak with Nenedhel and inform him that Nífdir'…
